title: Department Manager Vacancy at Health & Glow - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Health & Glow - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Health & Glow in Noida is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Health & Glow:
Health & Glow is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Health & Glow!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
